name: p2p-upi-gateway
description: P2P UPI Payment Gateway - monorepo root (single-command dev startup)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,admin,trader,merchant,checkout -c blue,magenta,red,green,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run worker" "npm --prefix frontend/admin run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/trader run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/merchant run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/checkout run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n api,worker -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run worker"
scripts.dev:frontends: concurrently -n admin,trader,merchant,checkout -c red,green,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix frontend/admin run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/trader run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/merchant run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/checkout run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend/admin install && npm --prefix frontend/trader install && npm --prefix frontend/merchant install && npm --prefix frontend/checkout install
